query:
SELECT 
  u.id AS userId,
  u.name AS userName,
  u.phone,
  u.roles,
  p.id AS partnerId,
  p.isActive
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN partners p ON u.id = p.userId
WHERE u.phone = '13860029';
